draft:
Dear Priya,

Thank you for reaching out and for submitting the form. We apologize for the trouble with the EIN field submission; we've made a note of this error.

We have your information and will review it shortly. A member of our team will be in touch with next steps.

Best regards,
The Team
draft_rationale: The client reported a form submission error. The draft acknowledges the error and the client's message, states the firm is reviewing it, and promises a follow-up, aligning with the 'form submit error' firm note and the 'onboarding_lead' intent without confirming any unverified details.
